workshoptitle: Learn Oracle Database@Azure Architecture and Operations

tutorials.title: Introduction
tutorials.description: Workshop overview, prerequisites, and learning path.

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Review Azure Access, Offers, and Resource Organization
tutorials.description: Confirm the Azure subscription, private offer, resource group, and Oracle Database@Azure entry points.

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Review Exadata Infrastructure in Azure
tutorials.description: Inspect provisioned Exadata infrastructure, VM clusters, and DB server views from Azure.

tutorials.title: Lab 3: Explore the OCI Control Plane for Oracle Database@Azure
tutorials.description: Use OCI views to inspect subscription mapping, identity, VM cluster scaling, and database operations.

tutorials.title: Lab 4: Explore Autonomous Database Operations
tutorials.description: Review an Autonomous Database, disaster recovery status, and the create workflow.

tutorials.title: Lab 5: Review Monitoring and Cost Signals
tutorials.description: Use Azure and OCI monitoring views to discuss health, metrics, budget review, and operational follow-up.

tutorials.title: Need Help?
tutorials.description: Get support for LiveLabs workshop issues.
